parameters.name: filename
parameters.override_behavior: selects the basename of the single metric text file opened at startup and receiving the first-crossing time
parameters.valid_range: non-empty relative basename without directory separators; runner supplies the writable working directory

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rising-crossing threshold for vin

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets done output rise and fall smoothing

identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A with deterministic text-file metric output
identity.title: Crossing Metric Writer

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-threshold event detection and a latched completion state.
Limit file output to the declared metric record and filename basename parameter in the runner-provided writable directory.
Do not create waveform dumps, undeclared files, or validation-only outputs.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: The filename parameter names exactly one metric file basename in the runner-provided writable working directory; absolute paths and directory traversal are outside the public contract.
The first rising crossing of vin through vth is the event that records the metric and latches completion.
The metric file contains exactly one text record of the form `cross <time_seconds>` followed by a newline, where <time_seconds> is the first rising crossing time.
done remains low before the first qualifying crossing and high after it, with transition smoothing set by tr.
Later vin crossings do not clear done or create additional metric records.
